8905.issue: [W8905] Repository contains [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.web/blob/master/package.json) files in non-root directories (e.g. /src-admin/package.json, /src-login/package.json, /src-www/package.json). Dependabot may miss updates unless the "npm" ecosystem entry uses "directories: ['**/*']" instead of "directory: '/'"

8915.issue: [W8915] Dependabot npm entry (directory: "/src") has no "cooldown" configured. A cooldown of at least 7 days (e.g. "cooldown: { default: 7 }") is recommended to reduce supply chain risk.
